info.title: smooth-code-repo-index
info.description: CLI for monorepo code indexing and retrieval with first-class AGENTS.md support. Index, search, and query bounded contexts from the command line.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Smooth Code Repository Index - monorepo indexing for AI agents with AGENTS.md support

commands.name: index
commands.description: Build the index (deep by default, --shallow to skip chunking)

commands.name: where-am-i
commands.description: Identify the bounded context for a file or directory

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search the indexed codebase (requires deep index)

commands.name: context
commands.description: Get assembled LLM context for a query

commands.name: agents-context
commands.description: Load the full AGENTS.md for a bounded context

commands.name: install-hooks
commands.description: Install git post-merge hook in configured repos
